channel.title: WNwildNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from WNwildNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: World's largest snack store sells over 30,000 kinds from 70 countries
item.description: Snack Kingdom covers 12,000 square meters and offers 35,000 different snacks.

item.title: Bored man confesses to starting forest fire for amusement
item.description: Thai man says he deliberately set fire because he was bored and wanted entertainment.

item.title: 'I met 40 people who claim to have seen aliens: this is why I don't believe them'
'Puma-like' big cat sighting reignites mystery of legendary UK beast
item.description: Reports of hybrid Kellas cat between wildcat and domestic breeds continue over 40 years.

item.title: Family uses AI clone of deceased man to spare his 80-year-old mother
item.description: Chinese family creates digital replica to hide son's death from elderly mother.

item.title: Restaurant goes viral for see-through pork slices dubbed 'stealth pork'
item.description: Japanese all-you-can-eat eatery's impossibly thin cuts attract online attention.

item.title: 14-year-old whiz kid builds working aircraft engine by hand
item.description: Chinese aeronautics enthusiast spends most of his time on functional jet engine.

item.title: Psychic who claims to talk to dead says they share two regrets about life
First new Nessie 'sightings' in months reignite Loch Ness mystery
item.description: American tourist reports seeing 'dark-greenish grey body' on March 1.

item.title: Woman starts sneezing out bugs after developing infection
item.description: Parasitic fly larvae caused rare and terrifying ailment in patient.
